title: MegaParrot
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/SB7AWkLAvp0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Infographic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9usMkV26/images/6ad01939ec61b496e14160a57f48a49f4ff81fe1.png)
![preview gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9usMkV26/images/a274c822775031d8e390aaa8837551b70bba8e2f.gif)
Megaparrots are found in jungles, plains, deserts and taigas. They come in many colors. Fully supports armor and saddles. Nametag skins: Mordecai, Commissargrey, chone, skylorbeck
